_fragment: Phase 5 (session0-polish) — Vladislav enhancements: three-stage demo, awareness phases, Dominik recognition, counter-whisper, breadcrumb, search-body, dawn speech

unease.behavior: senses something wrong in the inn, can't localize

window_watch.behavior: moves to east window (existing event vladislav_to_window)

recognition.behavior: recognizes Dominik as a rival spawn

calculating.behavior: deciding who to use, who to warn, when to strike

reactive.behavior: acts — counter-whispers, helps party if it helps him, fights if he must

stages.1: first attack absorbed — weapon passes through his form like mist, rematerializes. No wound. No reaction. He continues whatever he was doing.
stages.2: second attack — catches the weapon one-handed and crushes the blade with two fingers. Speaks without turning: 'The next one costs a finger. The one after that costs a hand.'
stages.3: third attack — Frightful Presence (Wis DC 18, frightened 1 round). Dissolves into mist, reforms behind attackers, their weapons lie on the table. 'You are alive because I am interested in whether you stay that way. Sit down.' After stage 3, if attacks continue, he defends normally but deals non-lethal damage only.

demoStateMachine.advanceOn: any player melee or ranged attack against hooded-stranger that would otherwise land
demoStateMachine.resetOn: combat ends with no fatalities OR scene resets

matthiasRelationship.passwordForParty: Tell him Vladislav said his prayers still work
matthiasRelationship.history: Matthias and Vladislav negotiated a non-aggression years ago when the region nearly collapsed into open vampire-hunting. Matthias lets Vladislav pass the abbey road unmolested; Vladislav does not feed within a day's walk of the abbey. Both have honored it. Gregor heard this from Matthias decades ago, which is why his dying mind spoke Vladislav's name to Matthias — he trusted it meant something.

data.description: Vladislav breadcrumb: if party hasn't identified Tomas as the werewolf threat, Vlad hints — directly to Ed (fallback Kim)
data.text: CONDITIONAL: only if state.flags.tomas_threat_identified !== true. Vladislav approaches Ed (fallback: Kim if Ed absent). Private dialogue to that PC's Chromebook, Common: 'The man who pours your drinks becomes something else tonight. You should decide, before the moon is full, whether you are his guests or his prey.' Important: this fires at 21:55, five minutes before 22:00 transform — any later and the hint is useless.

data.description: Vladislav counter-whisper to Ed — only if Dominik has been working him
data.text: CONDITIONAL: only if state.flags.ed_has_been_whispered_by_dominik === true. Private to Ed's Chromebook, Common: 'You play well. I heard a tune like that in Krakow, ten years ago. The bard who played it disappeared the next winter. I have a poor habit of outliving the people whose music I enjoy.' (pause) 'The monk is not what he seems. Neither am I. But tonight, on this matter, we are not enemies.'

data.description: Vladislav approaches Dominik's corpse — if Dominik died
data.text: CONDITIONAL: only if state.npcs.brother-dominik-novak.status === 'dead'. Fires once. Vladislav walks to Dominik's body. Looks at it for a long moment. Says quietly in Common, for the whole room: 'He was not alone. Search the body.' This is the party's clue that another spawn is in the inn (Spawn 1 upstairs). Set state.flags.vladislav_hinted_second_spawn = true.

data.description: Vladislav's dawn speech — if alive + party alive + not active enemies
data.text: CONDITIONAL: fires only if state.npcs.hooded-stranger.status === 'alive' AND at least one PC is alive AND state.flags.vladislav_is_party_enemy !== true. Delivered in Common (Latin-accented) to the whole table. 'You fought like children. You shot past your own. You left them back exposed when you charged. In a week you will stand in a castle where the doors close behind you and the dead watch from the walls. If you fight there the way you fought here, you will not walk out. I do not say this to wound you. I say this because I have decided, against my better judgment, that you are worth the saying. There is an abbey two days south. Saint Prokop. The cleric there — Matthias — knows what I am and lets me pass. He will help you. Tell him Vladislav said his prayers still work. Sunrise is coming. I have to leave. Try not to die before we meet again.' Vladislav exits via the front door. At the treeline he dissolves into mist and is gone. Set state.flags.vladislav_departed = true. Set state.flags.matthias_password_given = true. Set state.futureHooks.abbey-of-saint-prokop.seeded = true.

slovakPhonetics._note: Phonetic transliterations for Dave to deliver Slovak lines at the table without needing to read the accented text.

starec_priest_zveril.english: Old man, the priest entrusted this to you?

vladislav_povedal_modlitby_funguju.slovak: Vladislav povedal, že jeho modlitby stále fungujú
vladislav_povedal_modlitby_funguju.phonetic: VLA-dis-laff PO-ve-dal zhe YE-ho MOD-lit-bi STA-le FUN-goo-yoo
vladislav_povedal_modlitby_funguju.english: Vladislav said his prayers still work
